flora.subtitle: Rebel Bloom
flora.description: Beneath petals of onyx simmers a slow wrath. Each thorn marks a broken oath; each blossom, a deferred reckoning. Night opens to her passage like a garden someone forgot to lock.

hilda.subtitle: Crimson Apron
hilda.description: Beneath the spotless linens of a maid in service to a noble house sleep the tools of a fidelity sharper than stone. When silence falls, her blades do the speaking.

nvzhu02.subtitle: Shadow's Reflection
nvzhu02.description: The other side of fate: where the light fades, another voice rises. She walks the abyss wearing the same face, but different oaths — and this time she chooses not to turn back.

nanzhu02.subtitle: Echo in Ink
nanzhu02.description: What you think you left behind sometimes returns, dressed as yourself. Beneath the mantle of shadow rest unkept promises, and a quiet step that no longer asks for forgiveness.

site.name: DNA Interactive
site.description: Interactive map and resources for Duet Night Abyss

legal.disclaimer: This site is not affiliated with or related to the creator of Duet Night Abyss.
legal.disclaimerFull: This map incorporates base location data and reference materials sourced from CN community contributions. This site does not monetize in any way. It is a free tool available to players to facilitate their exploration.
legal.disclaimerFullEn: This map incorporates base location data and reference materials sourced from CN community contributions. This site does not monetize in any way. It is a free tool available to players to facilitate their exploration.

home.heroDescription: Discover the mysterious world of {gameName} with our complete interactive map. Explore, mark and master every aspect of the game.
home.communityDescription: Join the DNA community and access community-created resources to enhance your gaming experience.
home.itemsSpotlightDescription: Quickly browse Demon Wedges, weapons, resources and crafting plans with detailed sheets, filters and multilingual search.
home.charactersSpotlightDescription: Discover all playable characters in Duet Night Abyss: elements, weapons, factions, portraits and translations in 7 languages.
home.builderSpotlightDescription: Pick a character, assemble weapons, Demon Wedges, genimons and priorities, then publish your setups for the community.
home.featureMapDescription: Full map covering all 8 regions of the game.
home.featureMarkersDescription: Marking system to track your progress.
home.featureResponsiveDescription: Responsive interface adapted to all screen sizes.
home.featureItemsDescription: Demon Wedge database with search, filters, pagination and multilingual comparison.
home.featureUpdatesDescription: Regular updates based on your feedback.

banner.itemsLibraryDetails: Browse Demon Wedges, resources, weapons and forge plans
banner.patchV14Details: New characters, mods, skills and items
banner.newMapsV14Details: Bloomfield Station, Ironworks, Outer Peaks, Taixu Mausoleum, Youlai Alley

community.streamerDescription: Follow Velkaine live to check out their gaming sessions, strategies and discoveries in the world of DNA.
community.wikiDescription: Access the full community wiki created by Velkaine and the community. All the essential info about DNA in one place.

codes.title: Redemption Codes
codes.description: Here is the list of active codes for Duet Night Abyss. Click a code to mark it as used. Used codes will be saved locally and crossed out.
codes.howToUseSteps: In game, go to Settings → Consumables → Redemption Code
codes.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all codes?
codes.infoOneUse: Codes can only be used once per account
codes.infoExpire: Some codes may expire, check regularly for updates
codes.infoAutoCredit: Rewards are automatically credited to your account after validation
codes.infoNotWorking: If a code doesn't work, it may have expired or already been used

map.importSuccess: Import successful: {imported} marker(s) imported. {ignored} old format(s) ignored and need to be re-marked.

mapInfo.title: Map Information
mapInfo.disclaimerFr: Cette carte intègre des données de localisation de base et des matériaux de référence provenant de contributions de la communauté CN. Ce site ne monétise à aucun cas. C'est un outil gratuit disponible aux joueurs pour faciliter leur exploration.
mapInfo.disclaimerEn: This map incorporates base location data and reference materials sourced from CN community contributions. This site does not monetize in any way. It is a free tool available to players to facilitate their exploration.

imageZoom.instructions: Scroll to zoom • Click and drag to move • ESC to close

import.title: Import markers
import.description: Drag and drop a JSON file or click to select a file.
import.dropHere: Drag and drop your file here
import.errorJsonRequired: File must be in JSON format (.json)

about.title: About {siteName}
about.originParagraph1: {siteName} was born from a player's passion for {gameName}, a captivating adventure game developed by Ascencia. Faced with the vastness of the game world and the complexity of its exploration, we decided to create a tool to help players navigate more efficiently.
about.originParagraph2: Our goal is simple: provide a complete and intuitive interactive map that lets all players uncover the hidden secrets of {gameName} without getting lost in this mysterious and fascinating world.
about.offerMapDescription: 6 fully mapped regions with smooth navigation
about.offerMarkersDescription: Automatic tracking of your exploration progress
about.offerFiltersDescription: Categorization by content type (chests, NPCs, points of interest)
about.offerResponsiveDescription: Compatible with desktop and mobile for maximum accessibility
about.offerPassionDescription: Community project created by and for players
about.offerUpdatesDescription: Constantly evolving based on community feedback
about.teamDescription: Passionate about web development and gaming, Ahmed Karim (PedroKarim) created DNA Interactive to help the Duet Night Abyss player community better explore this fascinating universe. The project is constantly evolving thanks to community feedback and suggestions.
about.disclaimerBody: {siteName} is in no way affiliated with or related to the creator of {gameName}. This site is an independent community project created by fans for fans. All data and resources used come from public sources and respect the copyrights and terms of use of the original game.
about.disclaimerOfficialLink: For more information about the official game, visit the Ascencia website.
about.joinCommunityDescription: DNA Interactive evolves thanks to you. Share your feedback, suggestions and experiences to help us improve the tool for the entire community.

support.title: Support & Help
support.subtitle: Need help? Find all the resources to assist you!
support.discordDescription: Join our Discord server for real-time help, chat with other players and stay up to date with the latest updates.
support.emailDescription: For more complex requests, detailed bug reports or improvement suggestions, reach out to us via email.
support.faq1Question: How do I use the interactive map?
support.faq1Answer: The map is intuitive: zoom with the scroll wheel, click on markers to see details. Use the side menu to filter categories.
support.faq2Question: Is the data up to date?
support.faq2Answer: We strive to keep the data current. If you find incorrect information, please report it via Discord or email.
support.faq3Question: Can I contribute to the project?
support.faq3Answer: Absolutely! Contact us on Discord to discuss possible contributions, whether technical or content-related.
support.faq4Question: Does the site work on mobile?
support.faq4Answer: Yes, the site is responsive and works on all devices. However, the best experience is on desktop.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Got a question or feedback? Don't hesitate to reach out!
contact.supportDescription: For technical support, join our Discord or check the Support page
contact.joinCommunityDescription: To chat with other players and get help, join our Discord server!
contact.successMessage: Your message has been sent successfully! We'll get back to you within 24-48h.
contact.errorGeneric: An error occurred while sending the message.
contact.errorRecaptcha: reCAPTCHA hasn't loaded yet. Please try again.
contact.requiredFieldsNote: * All fields are required. Your message will be sent directly to our team.

gameInfo.name: Duet Night Abyss
gameInfo.description: Duet Night Abyss is a captivating adventure game that transports you into a mysterious world filled with secrets, strange creatures and hidden treasures.
gameInfo.mapDescription: Our interactive map helps you navigate this vast universe, track your progress and uncover all the hidden elements that make this game exceptional.

supportInfo.discordDescription: Real-time technical support, community discussions, update announcements
supportInfo.emailDescription: For detailed bugs, improvement suggestions, complex requests

metadata.homeTitle: DNA Interactive - Duet Night Abyss Interactive Map | Gaming Map
metadata.homeDescription: The ultimate interactive map for Duet Night Abyss. Explore the game world with DNA Interactive: find all secrets, chests and collectibles. A must-have tool for DNA players.
metadata.mapDescription: Complete interactive map of Duet Night Abyss. Explore all 6 regions, find every secret, chest and point of interest. A must-have tool for Duet Night Abyss players.
metadata.itemsDescription: Duet Night Abyss item database: Demon Wedges, weapons, resources and forge plans with filters and detailed sheets.
metadata.charactersDescription: Database of Duet Night Abyss playable characters: elements, weapons, factions, portraits and multilingual translations.
metadata.codesTitle: Duet Night Abyss Redemption Codes | DNA Interactive
metadata.codesDescription: Discover all active redemption codes for Duet Night Abyss. Promo codes, free rewards and exclusive bonuses. Regularly updated with new codes.
metadata.aboutDescription: Discover the story and team behind DNA Interactive. A community project created by passionate players to help the Duet Night Abyss community.
metadata.contactDescription: Contact the DNA Interactive team for your questions, suggestions or reports about the Duet Night Abyss interactive map. Fast response guaranteed.
metadata.supportDescription: Help center and support for DNA Interactive. FAQ, usage guides, Discord contact and technical support for the interactive map.
metadata.changelogDescription: Discover all updates and improvements made to DNA Interactive, the Duet Night Abyss interactive map. Full version history and new features.
metadata.defaultDescription: The ultimate interactive map for Duet Night Abyss. Explore the game world with DNA Interactive.

metadata.ogDescription: The ultimate interactive map for Duet Night Abyss. Explore the game world with DNA Interactive: find all secrets, chests and collectibles.
metadata.twitterDescription: The ultimate interactive map for Duet Night Abyss. Find all secrets and collectibles with DNA Interactive.

account.title: Profile
account.loginPrompt: Sign in with Discord to view your profile.
account.privacyText: Your data (nickname, avatar, builds) is described in the <link>privacy policy</link>.
account.deleteWarning: This permanently deletes your account, your builds, your drafts and your votes. Irreversible.
account.deleteFailed: Deletion failed. Please try again later.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy and terms of use of the DNA Interactive community build builder.
privacy.title: Privacy & terms
privacy.intro: Applies to Discord sign-in and the community build builder.
privacy.data1: Discord ID, nickname and avatar (to identify you as an author).
privacy.data2: Your Discord email, if you allow it at sign-in.
privacy.data3: The builds, drafts and votes you create on the site.
privacy.dataNote: No other data is collected. We do not use your data for advertising and do not sell it.
privacy.purposeText: This data is only used to run accounts and build sharing (authentication, attributing a build to its author, votes, moderation). It is kept as long as your account exists and is deleted when you delete your account.
privacy.rightsText: At any time you can view your data, edit or delete your builds, and permanently delete your account (together with all your builds, drafts and votes) from your profile. Deletion is immediate and irreversible.
privacy.ugc1: You remain responsible for the builds and names you publish.
privacy.ugc2: Build names and notes must not contain hateful speech, harassment, illegal content or spam.
privacy.ugc3: A build can be reported by the community; an administrator may hide or delete it, and ban an account in case of repeated abuse.
privacy.ugc4: By publishing a build, you agree that it is displayed publicly on the site with your Discord nickname and avatar.
privacy.contactText: For any question about your data or the removal of content, use the <link>contact</link> page.
